name: Harutoki Ide
alt_names: Pace no Harutoki (ペースのハルトキ)
description: Harutoki is a teenage boy who gave Yasutora Sado the parakeet in which Yūichi Shibata's soul resided. He was saved from an enormous steel beam by Chad. He is later again seen with his friend Shigeo and Chad on their way to get something to eat when they are suddenly attacked by Bulbous G.
